activityLogSiteDataDomainsText.description: Removed $siteData$ for: $domains$. Found in Activity Log Detailed Entries.

browsingDataNoEmptyWarning.message: Heads up: enabling this does not touch data that sites stored earlier. A site's leftover data only becomes cleanable after you visit it again — until then it stays put, even for sites you would rather purge.

browsingDataWarning.description: Caution: switching on any cleanup type below immediately erases ALL currently stored data of that type, for every site. Found in ADCP Settings
